product.name: Proof of Possible
product.thesis: Compile one constrained goal into a preregistered real-world experiment, preserve what happened honestly, and make the next decision recoverable.
product.ethicalBoundary: Completed, attempted, and blocked remain valid. Self-recorded observations are never presented as independently verified truth.

observations.freshUserMinimumBeforeReview: four text inputs, one timebox, and one confidence value
observations.metric: First-Evidence Rate = any recorded outcome / goals created

strategies.observed: Six required dimensions and metrics before the task delayed first value.
strategies.proposal: Two text inputs plus one proof pattern; defer optional context.

strategies.observed: The generic mission and prose-only simplification did not guarantee a concrete smaller task.
strategies.proposal: Template action/target/criterion and require a reduced numeric scope.

strategies.observed: Criteria could change after start and receipts offered no status-specific decision.
strategies.proposal: Preregister, record action timing, and branch through linked decisions.

strategies.observed: The timer could not be hidden and mobile/keyboard behavior lacked a browser contract.
strategies.proposal: Non-coercive timer, dual-contrast focus, wrapping steps, and browser tests.

strategies.observed: Any outcome, including weak self-attestation, counted as first evidence.
strategies.proposal: Count evidence-bearing criterion verdicts over sprints started.

strategies.observed: Two characters or a URL passed, mutable criteria enabled goalpost movement, and corrupt state reset clean.
strategies.proposal: Meaningful observations, frozen criteria, validation, and journal recovery.

strategies.observed: Pre-commit thinking was not recoverable and receipts did not lead to a decision.
strategies.proposal: Autosaved drafts, safe data controls, and linked successors.

strategies.observed: No migration, journal, merge, DOM contract, or JS/CSS network check protected the release.
strategies.proposal: Validated envelopes, additive merges, pinned browser tests, and expanded network checks.

consensus.scoringMethod: Each of the eight independent audits allocated 1 (reject) through 5 (must ship) to each cross-audit mutation. Scores are summed without weighting; maximum is 40. All three candidates exceeded the preregistered selection threshold of 32/40 and no fourth product mutation was introduced.
consensus.rationale: The audits converged on reducing activation work, preserving evidentiary integrity, and preventing local data loss. Browser release testing is required release infrastructure, not a fourth product mutation.

selectedMutations.name: ASSISTED EXPERIMENT COMPILER + TASK-FIRST FLOW
selectedMutations.summary: Two text inputs and one proof pattern deterministically produce one editable action, target/artifact, explicit criterion, numeric scope, stop condition, and one-to-ten-minute timebox.

selectedMutations.name: PREREGISTERED, CRITERION-LINKED EVIDENCE + NEXT DECISION
selectedMutations.summary: Sprint start freezes mission and criterion; receipts separate action timing, compassionate status, observation, verdict, and verification boundary before a status-specific linked decision.

selectedMutations.name: RECOVERABLE LOCAL WORKSPACE
selectedMutations.summary: Non-counting drafts, v1 migration, validated v2 envelopes, recovery journal, revision merge, and safe JSON export/import/delete protect local work.

assisted-experiment-compiler.criterion: A fresh user reaches review with two text inputs and one proof choice.
Every compiler output has an action verb, one target/artifact, explicit criterion, <=10-minute stop, and correct singular/plural copy.
assisted-experiment-compiler.evidence: compiler matrix and one-minute unit tests

assisted-experiment-compiler.criterion: Simplification strictly lowers the declared numeric scope for every proof pattern, rewrites the original claim, and uses grammatical singular/plural copy.
assisted-experiment-compiler.evidence: compiler matrix plus direct scope-reduction button assertions across ask, make, check, and send

criterion-linked-evidence.criterion: Mission and criterion remain unchanged across start and reload.
Two-character or URL-only input cannot become evidence-bearing.
Receipt separates action timing, activity status, observation, verdict, and independent-verification boundary.
Metric always recomputes evidence-bearing receipts / sprints started from the observation instead of trusting imported derived fields.
criterion-linked-evidence.evidence: metric unit tests and derived-field spoof browser import

recoverable-local-workspace.criterion: Draft survives reload without entering history or metrics; Back preserves and Discard deliberately removes it.
recoverable-local-workspace.evidence: browser draft recovery and domain denominator tests

recoverable-local-workspace.criterion: Malformed or semantically contradictory import fails without data loss or an uncaught browser error.
recoverable-local-workspace.evidence: browser malformed/contradictory import assertions with automatic pageerror and console-error guards

recoverable-local-workspace.criterion: Export, clear, and import restores the workspace; delete removes both primary and journal.
The newest semantically valid revision wins; corrupt primary recovery and double-corruption reset are reported truthfully.
recoverable-local-workspace.evidence: revision-selection, invalid-newer-copy, double-corruption, journal recovery, and additive merge tests

release.criterion: Real Chromium journeys cover reload, both decision buttons, every simplification button path, skip-link focus, imports, and every populated panel at 320px with 200% text.
release.evidence: eight built-artifact browser tests with automatic pageerror, console-error, request-origin, and element-overflow guards

release.criterion: Static third-party checks include HTML, runtime JavaScript, and CSS.
Pages deploys the exact _site artifact exercised by Chromium and publishes non-self-referential build provenance.
release.evidence: single-build Pages workflow, deployment artifact test, and generated /provenance.json with SHA, run, timestamp, git tree, per-file hashes, and aggregate content digest

frame2.formula: evidence-bearing receipts with an explicit frozen-criterion verdict / sprints started

tests.status: passed locally; both commands are mandatory deployment gates

release.provenancePolicy: The build emits the deployed GITHUB_SHA, GITHUB_RUN_ID, GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT, build timestamp, git tree SHA, and deterministic content digest. This frame file intentionally does not self-claim a mutable current commit or run.
